name: Black Butler Sandbox RP
description:
Basically, you get thrown into the Kuroshitsuji Universe. It is still the 19th century and characters will be as close as possible to the source material.

You're in the heart of London. How you got here is for you to decide. And how you get out again is left to destiny and your decisions.

You can seek out characters actively, or simply go about your day leaving it to chance on who you meet.

Characters included:

Sebastian Michaelis (fleshed out)

Ciel Phantomhive (fleshed out)

Elizabeth Midford

Tanaka

Mey-Rin

Finnian

Bardroy

Grell Sutcliff

William T. Spears

Ronald Knox

Undertaker (fleshed out)

Prince Soma

Agni

Lau (fleshed out)

Ran-Mao

Joker (fleshed out)
creator: Melielielian
